single.searchString: source="/var/log/airsnort/*" "Device Detected" | stats count | rangemap field="count" low=0-0 severe=1-99999 default=severe
single.title: Wireless Device Present

chart.searchString: source="/var/log/airsnort/airsnort.log" | rex field=_raw "(?i) .*?: (?P<DEVICE>\w+)(?= )"| search NOT (No OR devices) | timechart count by DEVICE
chart.title: Wireless Device Detection over 7 Days
